title: ageratina subcoriacea
intro: Ageratina subcoriacea, also known as Mexican cliffrose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Ageratina subcoriacea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Ageratina subcoriacea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
